reason: Uses decadal family scores and five driver-block predictors; suitable for current small prototype panel.
Computed as full ridge R2 minus reduced ridge R2 with one block removed.
Computed with 500 permutations per block using the fitted standardized ridge model.
Current panel is small for smooth-term inference after decadal aggregation (6 cities, 1 pathway, 3 score families). Use only after adding pathways/cities or keep as exploratory.
City random effects are confounded with Koppen type because each Koppen type has one representative city; pathway random/fixed effects are unavailable because scenario_count=1.
